name: TouchDesigner MCP Server
what_it_does: TouchDesigner MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Derivative's TouchDesigner visual programming environment — creating and modifying nodes, executing Python scripts within TouchDesigner, controlling parameters in real-time, querying network topology, and integrating LLM-driven generation into TouchDesigner-based generative art, live performance, and interactive installation workflows.
use_cases: Generating and modifying TouchDesigner networks from creative coding agents
Controlling real-time visual parameters from AI-driven performance agents
Automating TouchDesigner patch creation from generative art agents
Executing Python scripts within TouchDesigner from automation agents
Building AI-assisted visual programming workflows for live events
Prototyping interactive installations with LLM-driven node generation
not_for: Teams without TouchDesigner license (commercial license required for production use)
Teams preferring Blender, Unity, or other VFX tools
best_when: A creative technologist or VJ/live performer with TouchDesigner needs AI-assisted real-time generative content — combining LLM reasoning with TouchDesigner's node-based visual programming.
avoid_when: You don't use TouchDesigner for creative coding or visual performance work.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with local TouchDesigner instance via Python DAT or WebSocket. TouchDesigner must be running with MCP server component loaded.

pricing.free_tier_limits: TouchDesigner: free non-commercial license available (watermarked output)
pricing.notes: TouchDesigner has free non-commercial tier. MCP server is free open source. Commercial TouchDesigner license required for production use without watermarks.

performance.rate_limits: Local TouchDesigner — no external rate limits; GPU/CPU bound

known_agent_gotchas: TouchDesigner must be running with MCP server component/DAT loaded
TouchDesigner Python API knowledge helpful for effective prompting
Network topology can get complex — agents need clear node naming conventions
Real-time parameter changes affect live output immediately — test carefully
TouchDesigner version compatibility — Python API evolves between versions
Non-commercial license watermarks output — commercial use requires paid license
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local TouchDesigner process. No network credentials. Python execution within TouchDesigner sandbox. Community MCP. Function03 labs contributor. Run on trusted workstation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local TouchDesigner. No credentials. Python runs inside TD. Community MCP. Trusted workstation only.
